since_last: 38% of 101 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.43%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 38% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.89% · BTC -1.10% · Gold +1.55% · Nasdaq100 +1.93%. 38% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.43%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.43%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +12.55%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +12.55%, CHKP +3.10%, DELL +2.81%, HPE +2.23%, OKLO +2.08%. Laggards: SKHY -6.67%, MGNI -4.29%, TER -4.27%, MU -3.86%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.25% at $123.23
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
